title: ononis pusilla var. orientalis
intro: Ononis pusilla var. orientalis, also known as dwarf spiny restharrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Ononis pusilla var. orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
